channel.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Sep 26th - Oct 2nd, 2022
item.description:
Frameworks

  • meerkatstars2 - I2C Data Acquisition for MicroPython and Raspberry Pi.

    • Libraries

    Scheduling

  • Schedule A scheduler for uasyncio based applications. Schedule events at specified times and dates.
  • micropython-aioschedulestars1 A persistent uasyncio scheduler that supports deepsleep between task runs.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Sep 5th - Sep 11th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

Ethernet

  • Official wiznet5kstars0 - Driver for the WIZnet5x00 series of Ethernet controllers.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Aug 29th - Sep 4th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

Temperature Digital

  • sht85stars0 - MicroPython driver for the Sensiron SHT85 humidity and temperature sensor.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Aug 8th - Aug 14th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

Barometer

  • BMP390stars1 - MicroPython module for BMP390 pressure & temperature sensor.
  • BMP180stars2 - MicroPython module for BMP180 pressure & temperature sensor.

    • Tutorials

  • CoderDojo Twin Cities MicroPython - Full coding curriculum for teaching MicroPython to children.

    • Libraries

    LEDs

  • micropython-dotstarstars20 - A MicroPython port of the Adafruit CircuitPython APA102/DotStar library.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jul 25th - Jul 31st, 2022
item.description:
Development

On Host

  • mpremote - Powerful official shell that supports mounting the host's current directory on the target. Run code without changing the target's filesystem.

    • Books

  • MicroPython for the Internet of Things: A Beginner's Guide to Programming with Python on Microcontrollers - By Charles Bell. ISBN 9781484231227.
  • Beginning MicroPython with the Raspberry Pi Pico: Build Electronics and IoT Projects - By Charles Bell. ISBN 9781484281345.
  • Python for Microcontrollers: Getting Started with MicroPython - By Donald Norris. ISBN 9781259644535.

    • Libraries

    Authentication

  • micropython-firebase-authstars3 - Firebase Auth implementation for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Gaseous

  • MICS6814-Micropython-driver - ESP32 MicroPython driver for the Pimoroni mics6814 breakout board.

    • Libraries

    Database

  • micropython-firebase-firestorestars4 - Firebase Firestore implementation for MicroPython.

    • Tutorials

  • Bhavesh Kakwani - Bi-weekly MicroPython video + written tutorials.
  • Miguel Grinberg - MicroPython and the Internet of Things.
  • uasyncio - Write asynchronous code which interfaces to hardware devices.
  • Asynchronous drivers - Tutorial and code for asynchronous interfaces to switches, pushbuttons, encoders and ADCs.
  • Pyboard micropowerstars43 - Tutorial and code for low power applications on Pyboard 1.x and Pyboard D.
  • 3D rotation with quaternions - Tutorial and code for the easy way to do 3D rotation.

    • Libraries

    AI

  • MicroPython-NeuralNetwork - Neural Network for MicroPython.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

ADC

  • micropython-pcf8591 - MicroPython driver for PCF8591 ADC/DAC, I2C interface.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Mar 21st - Mar 27th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

LEDs

  • Official APA102 - ESP8266 APA102/DotStar RGB LED driver.
  • Official WS2811 - ESP8266 WS2811/NeoPixel RGB LED driver.

    • Books

  • Programming with MicroPython: Embedded Programming with Microcontrollers and Python - By Nicholas H. Tollervey. ISBN 9781491972731.

    • Resources

  • MicroPython - Project website. Test drive the pyboard. Try MicroPython online with unicorn.
  • MicroPython Official Documentation - For various ports, including quick reference, general information, examples and tutorials.
  • MicroPython Wiki - Community generated documentation and examples of the features of MicroPython and the pyboard.
  • MicroPython Newsletter - Subscribe to the MicroPython newsletter for news and announcements including new features and new products.

    • Libraries

  • Codeberg Explore - Explore repositories on Codeberg.

    • Libraries

    NFC

  • micropython_pn532stars2 - Driver for PN532 NFC/RFID breakout boards based on Adafruit CircuitPython (UART).

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Feb 21st - Feb 27th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

WiFi

  • Micropython-ESP-WiFi-Managerstars8 - WiFi Manager to configure and connect to networks.

    • Libraries

    Modbus

  • micropython-modbusstars22 - ModBus TCP and RTU library supporting client and host mode. Based on pycom-modbus from pycom.

    • Libraries

    Serial

  • I2C Slave - Uses the Pyboard's I2C slave mode to implement a full duplex asynchronous link. Principal use case is for ESP8266 which has only one UART.

    • Libraries

    Flash

  • micropython-winbondstars0 - Interact with Winbond W25Q Flash chips via SPI.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jan 24th - Jan 30th, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

Ethernet

  • RP2040 Ethernet examplestars2 - Ethernet driver, example python code and YouTube.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jan 17th - Jan 23rd, 2022
item.description:
Libraries

Ethernet

  • micropy-ENC28J60stars10 - ENC28J60 Ethernet chip driver for MicroPython (RP2).

    • Frameworks

  • perthensis - Perthensis: an asynchronous framework for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Bluetooth

  • mijia-temphum-upy - MicroPython library to read certain Xiaomi Mijia BLE temperature & humidity sensors.
  • micropython-xiaomi-ble-adv-parse - Passively retrieve sensor data from some Xiaomi Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) sensors.

    • Libraries

    IR

  • pico-irstars3 - IR library for Raspberry Pi Pico.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Nov 15th - Nov 21st, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

LCD Character

  • LCM1602-14_LCD_Librarystars8 - driver for AIP31068L 3.3 V I2C and SPI 1602 Serial Character LCDs.

    • Libraries

    OLED

  • sh1107-micropythonstars6 - MicroPython driver for SH1107-based OLED display (64 x 128).

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Nov 8th - Nov 14th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Flash

  • micropython_data_to_pystars19 - A Python3 utility to convert an arbitrary binary file to Python source for freezing as bytecode in Flash.

    • Libraries

    Analytics

  • Filtersstars51 FIR filters using ARM Thumb assembler. Using an online utility you can go from a graph

    • Libraries

    GPS

  • Asynchronous GPS driver Receive and parse GPS data as a uasyncio task.

    • Libraries

    IoT

  • micropython-iotstars73 - An approach to designing IOT applications using ESP8266, ESP32 or Pyboard D endpoints.

    • Libraries

    Fonts

  • writer A simple way to render above Python fonts to displays whose driver is subclassed from framebuf.

    • Libraries

    GUI

  • micropython-nano-guistars255 - A tiny display-only GUI with a limited set of GUI objects (widgets) for displays whose display driver is subclassed from the framebuf class. With drivers for TFT, ePaper and OLED displays.
  • micro-guistars85 Derived from nano-gui and supporting the same displays and hosts, this provides for user

    • Libraries

    Rotary Encoder

  • encoders Short document explaining issues around encoder technology.
  • asynchronous encoder driver Interface an encoder to uasyncio code.

    • Libraries

    Temperature Digital

  • HTU21D Asynchronous driver for this temperature and humidity sensor.

    • Libraries

    EEPROM

  • micropython_eepromstars45 - Cross platform MicroPython device drivers for memory chips (EEPROM, FRAM, Flash, PSRAM).

    • Development

    Debugging

  • micropython-aiosentrystars7 - Asynchronous Sentry.io micro client for MicroPython.
  • Asynchronous monitorstars14 Use a Raspberry Pico and a logic analyser or scope to monitor asynchronous code.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Oct 25th - Oct 31st, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Distance Laser

  • vl53l5cxstars3 - MicroPython and CircuitPython Package for the VL53L5CX (4x4/8x8 ToF sensor array).

    • Libraries

    Compression

  • ufastlzstars4 - MicroPython wrapper for FastLZ, a lightning-fast lossless compression library.

    • Libraries

    Database

  • uSQLitestars35 - SQLite library module for MicroPython.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Oct 18th - Oct 24th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

LoRaWAN

  • u-lorastars33 - Raspi-lora for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    E-Paper

  • eInk-micropythonstars20 - E-Ink library for Waveshare 4.3inch device on MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Potentiometers

  • mcp4131stars2 - MicroPython module to control MicroChip's MCP4131 SPI digital potentiometer.

    • Libraries

    Motion Inertial

  • micropython-bno055stars25 - Bosch BNO055 driver for MicroPython. IMU with hardware sensor fusion.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Sep 13th - Sep 19th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Temperature Digital

  • micropython_ahtx0stars8 - MicroPython driver for the AHT10 and AHT20 temperature and humidity sensors.
  • micropython-sht30stars1 - SHT30 sensor driver in pure python based on I2C bus.
  • sht25-micropython - MicroPython implementation of API of SHT25 Humidity and Temperature Sensor.
  • esp-sht3x-micropythonstars5 - A SHT3x (SHT30/31/35) Lib for esp8266/esp32 with MicroPython.
  • htu21d-esp8266stars5 - This is a MicroPython module / class to measure data from the htu21d.
  • BME680-Micropythonstars19 - MicroPython driver for the BME680 sensor.

    • Libraries

    Cryptography

  • micropython-cryptomsgstars2 - A MicroPython module to encrypt and decrypt messages with AES CBC mode.
  • ucryptoauthlibstars32 - Lightweight driver for Microchip Crypto Authentication secure elements written in pure python for MicroPython.
  • micropython-rsa-signingstars11 - RSA signing on MicroPython.
  • microotpstars18 - A ESP8266 MicroPython OTP Generator.
  • ucryptostars7 - MicroPython package for doing fast elliptic curve cryptography, specifically digital signatures. API design inspired from fastecdsa and implementation based on tomsfastmath.
  • embitstars34 - A minimal bitcoin library for MicroPython and Python3 with a focus on embedded systems.

    • Libraries

    Current

  • micropython-current-monitor - Current monitor using the INA219 and an SSD1306 OLED.
  • TI_INA226_micropythonstars15 - MicroPython driver for Texas Instruments INA226 power measuring IC.
  • INA219stars5 - INA219 MicroPython driver.

    • Libraries

    LCD TFT

  • micropython-st7735-esp8266 - MicroPython driver for ST7735 TFT displays on the esp8266.
  • ili934x-micropython - Library for using ILI9341 display drivers with MicroPython.
  • st7735_micropythonstars1 - ST7735 MicroPython drivers for 80x160, 128x128, 128x160 for ESP8266.
  • TTGO-ST7789-MicroPythonstars15 - MicroPython ST7789 display driver for TTGO T-Display ESP32 CP2104 WiFi Bluetooth Module 1.14 Inch LCD.
  • st7735-esp8266-micropythonstars11 - An ESP8266 MicroPython library for st7735 160x80, 128x128, 128x160 TFT LCD displays.
  • gc9a01_mpystars19 - Fast MicroPython driver for GC9A01 display modules written in C.
  • gc9a01pystars17 - GC9A01 Display driver in MicroPython.
  • ili9342c_mpystars30 - ILI9342C Fast 'C' Driver for MicroPython (M5Stack Core).
  • st7789py_mpystars55 - Driver for 320x240, 240x240 and 135x240 ST7789 displays written in MicroPython.
  • st7789_mpystars254 - Fast MicroPython driver for ST7789 display module written in C.

    • Libraries

    Keyboard

  • micropython-aiobuttonstars2 - A MicroPython module for asyncio button.
  • pico-rgbkeypadstars41 - A Python class for controlling the Pimoroni RGB Keypad for Raspberry Pi Pico.
  • micropython-keyboardstars24 - 47 key keyboard running on a MicroPython pyboard.

    • Libraries

    Gaseous

  • micropython-sgp40stars3 - MicroPython I2C driver for SGP40 VOC sensor module.

    • Libraries

    Temperature Analog

  • mcp9700 - Generic MicroPython driver for MCP9700.

    • Libraries

    Motion Inertial

  • micropython-mpu9250 - MicroPython MPU-9250 (MPU-6500 + AK8963) I2C driver.
  • flight_controllerstars49 - MicroPython flight controller.
  • micropython-bno08x-rvcstars1 - MicroPython library for bno08x.
  • upy-motionstars6 - A simple MPU6050 driver written in MicroPython.
  • micropython-mpu6050-mqtt-streamerstars7 - Stream data from MPU6050 to MQTT server using MicroPython on ESP8266.
  • micropython-fusionstars272 - Sensor fusion calculates heading, pitch and roll from the outputs of motion tracking devices.

    • Libraries

    Touch Capacitive

  • uFT6336Ustars1 - MicroPython I2C driver for the Focus LCDs FT6336U capacitive touch panel controller IC.
  • micropython-TTP229-BSFstars6 - MicroPython ESP8266/ESP32 driver for TTP229-BSF 16-key capacitive keypad in serial interface mode.

    • Libraries

    EEPROM

  • mb_24x256_512stars0 - Very simple MicroPython module/driver for Microchip 24x256 and 24x512 I2C EEPROM devices.

    • Libraries

    SRAM

  • mb_47x16stars0 - Very simple MicroPython module/driver for Microchip 47x16 EERAM devices (47L/47C).
  • mb_23LC1024stars1 - Very simple MicroPython module to use a Microchip 23LC1024 SPI SRAM with a Raspberry Pi Pico (RP2040).

    • Libraries

    PSRAM

  • mb_PSRAM_64Mb_SPIstars5 - Very simple MicroPython module to use a generic 64Mbit PSRAM (ie Adafruit 4677) with a Raspberry Pi Pico (RP2040).

    • Libraries

    Compass

  • microPython_AS5600Lstars1 - MicroPython driver for AS5600L magnet rotary position sensor.

    • Libraries

    Colour

  • micropython-tcs34725 - Driver class for TCS34725 and TCS34727 color sensors.

    • Libraries

    Barometer

  • micropython-bmp180 - A module for MicroPython which provides a class for the BMP180 pressure sensor.
  • MicroPython-BME280stars7 - Driver to digital sensor of Temperature, Pressure and Humidity.
  • micropython_bme280_i2cstars10 - A MicroPython module for communicating with the Bosch BME280 temperature, humidity, and pressure sensor.

    • Libraries

    DC Motor

  • MicroPython-L298 - Drive L298 dual H-bridge with MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Shift Registers

  • micropython-74hc595stars15 - MicroPython driver for 74HC595 8-bit shift registers.
  • MicroPython-SN74HCS264 - MicroPython Driver for SN74HCS264 8-Bit Parallel-Out Serial Shift Registers With Schmitt-Trigger Inputs and Inverted Outputs.

    • Libraries

    LEDs

  • micropython-rgb-led-driver - Tiny driver to control an RGB LED with PWM.
  • ws2812-SPIstars17 - An efficient MicroPython WS2812 (NeoPixel) driver.
  • micropython_quickledstars2 - MicroPython module which allows python to pump data into the ws2811 leds at full speed.
  • micropython_fastledstars14 - Port of FastLED to MicroPython.
  • micropython-rgbledstars10 - This wrapper module aims to reduce the work needed to work with NeoPixel (WS2812) and DotStar (APA102) RGB LED strips and matrixes.
  • Hybotics_Micropython_HT16K33stars33 - MicroPython driver for the HT16K33, a LED matrix, 7-Segment Numeric, and 14-Segment Alphanumeric display driver IC.

    • Libraries

    Serial

  • MicroPython-MorseCode - International Morse Code using a micro-controller with MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    LCD Character

  • HD44780-lcd-upy - MicroPython module for controlling a generic HD44780 LCD.

    • Libraries

    SOCKS

  • micropython-socksstars2 - MicroPython library implementing SOCKS server.

    • Libraries

    GSM

  • MicroPython-AM7020stars2 - MicroPython driver for AM7020 Narrowband Internet of Things (NBIoT) module.
  • sim800stars4 - Library for interfacing with SIM800 module in MicroPython.
  • micropython-sim800stars12 - MicroPython driver for sim800.

    • Libraries

    FTP

  • micropython-uaioftpstars1 - Lightweight FTP library for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    APIs

  • micropython-spotify-web-apistars6 - A library for using Spotify's web API from a IoT device with MicroPython.
  • micropython_pushbulletstars2 - Simple example of how to use PushBullet with MicroPython on ESP8266.
  • esp32-youtube-displaystars15 - Display YouTube metrics using Google API and MicroPython.
  • micropython-thingspeakstars11 - Library for sending data to thingspeak.com from IoT devices running MicroPython (such as ESP8266).
  • telegram-upystars29 - Telegram API wrapper for MicroPython.
  • micropython_esp8266_tweetbotstars10 - Tweet bot for MicroPython v1.8.4 (ESP8266).
  • micropython-youtube-apistars9 - YouTube API in MicroPython.
  • micropython-utelegramstars46 - Telegram API wrapper for MicroPython.
  • uEaglestars3 - MicroPython Rainforest EAGLE client.

    • Libraries

    Audio

  • micropython-buzzerstars12 - Play Nokia compose and mid files on buzzers.
  • micropython-jq6500stars16 - Driver for JQ6500 UART MP3 modules.
  • micropython-oscstars37 - A minimal OSC client and server library for MicroPython.
  • micropython-i2s-examplesstars83 - Examples for I2S support on microcontrollers that run MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Bluetooth

  • ublestars72 - Lightweight Bluetooth Low Energy driver written in pure Python for MicroPython.
  • upyblestars7 - Command line tool for Bluetooth Low Energy MicroPython devices.
  • MicroPythonBLEHIDstars84 - Human Interface Device (HID) over Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) GATT library for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Radio

  • ESP32-433Mhz-Receiver-and-Toolsstars4 - ESP32 433Mhz Receiver written in MicroPython and Tools for Windows.
  • micropython-ppm-decoderstars9 - Utility for decoding an R/C receiver PPM frame signal.
  • micropython-TEA5767stars28 - MicroPython ESP8266/ESP32 driver for TEA5767 FM radio module.
  • FM_Talkiestars3 - FM Walkie Talkie using RDA5820N.

    • Libraries

    WiFi

  • WiFiManagerstars246 - WiFi manager for ESP8266 - ESP12 - ESP32 - MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Pressure

  • ms5803-micropythonstars0 - A MicroPython implementation of the driver for an MS5803 pressure & temperature sensor.
  • MPL3115A2_MicroPythonstars3 - MicroPython library for the MPL3115A2 Altimeter.

    • Libraries

    Proximity

  • uPy_APDS9960stars5 - MicroPython proximity library for esp8266 using APDS9960.

    • Development

    IDEs

  • Pyboard File Managerstars3 - Pyboard File Manager: Windows GUI for Pyboard.py compatible devices.
  • BIPES - Web based IDE for MicroPython with file manager, editor, code generation from blocks, IoT dashboard and Serial/USB/Bluetooth/WebREPL console on the web browser! Source: https://github.com/BIPES.

    • Libraries

    LoRaWAN

  • micropySX126Xstars27 - Semtech SX126X LoRa driver for MicroPython and CircuitPython.
  • nanoserverstars5 - MicroPython embedded LoRaWAN server.
  • sx127x_espstars8 - Connect Ra-01 module base on LoRaTM sx127x chip to ESP8266/ESP32 under MicroPython.
  • LightLora_MicroPythonstars20 - Lightweight Interrupt-driven Semtech SX127x Library for MicroPython.
  • SX127x_driver_for_MicroPython_on_ESP8266stars118 - SX127x (LoRa transceiver) driver for (Micro)Python on ESP8266/ESP32/Raspberry_Pi.

    • Libraries

    Serialization

  • minipbstars37 - Mini Protobuf {de}serializer in pure Python.
  • micropython-uprotobufstars17 - A lightweight implementation of Google's Protocol Buffers (protobuf) for MicroPython.
  • micropython-msgpackstars13 - MessagePack serialisation library optimised for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    OTA

  • senkostars42 - Simplest OTA update solution for your MicroPython projects.
  • Micropython-ESP32-OTAstars11 - MicroPython updater based on rdehuyss/micropython-ota-updater.
  • micropython-ota-updaterstars289 - OTA Updater for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Graphics

  • microplotstars13 - Simple MicroPython plotting package.
  • micropython-oled-progressbarsstars4 - A collection of progress bars for use with esp8266 and esp32's on OLED displays.
  • mpy-img-decoderstars17 - PNG and JPEG decoder / parser / renderer in pure MicroPython.
  • micropython-pngstars6 - Derivative of PyPNG for use with MicroPython.
  • micropython-stagestars23 - A MicroPython port of the Stage game library.

    • Libraries

    Fonts

  • ssd1306bigstars16 - A font for MicroPython on 128x64 pixel ssd1306 oled display.
  • micropython-font-to-pystars228 - A Python 3 utility to convert fonts to Python source capable of being frozen as bytecode.

    • Development

    Debugging

  • micropython-usyslogstars13 - Simple remote syslog client for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Biometric

  • MAX30102-MicroPython-driverstars22 - A MAX30102 driver ported to MicroPython. It should also work for MAX30105.
  • micropython-fingerprintstars6 - MicroPython library for reading Grow and ZhianTec finger print sensors.

    • Libraries

    Battery

  • Micropython-LC709203Fstars2 - A simple MicroPython library for LC709293F Fuel Gauge.

    • Libraries

    Web

  • micropython-aiowebstars9 - A minimalist asyncio web framework for MicroPython.
  • micropython-configserverstars15 - Captive portal for MicroPython including a dumb DNS server and a webserver to configure wifi networks.
  • MicroWebClistars43 - A micro HTTP Web client for MicroPython (used on Pycom modules & ESP32).
  • micropython-nanowebstars67 - Full async MicroPython web server with small memory footprint.

    • Libraries

    NFC

  • NFC_PN532_SPIstars21 - Partial Port of Adafruit CircuitPython to MicroPython of PN532 NFC/RFID control library (SPI).
  • micropython-nfcstars8 - Using NFC with MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    MQTT

  • mqtt_upythonstars0 - MQTT Client using MicroPython on ESP8266.
  • MicropythonCayenneMQTTClientstars5 - A port of the Python Cayenne MQTT Client to MicroPython.
  • micropython-adafruit-mqtt-esp8266stars53 - Using MQTT to Publish/Subscribe to adafruit io. MicroPython/CircuitPython implementation on ESP8266/ESP32.
  • micropython-mqttstars28 - Async MQTT library with auto reconnect for MicroPython devices such as the ESP32 or Pycom devices.

    • Development

    On Host

  • ampystars606 - MicroPython Tool - Utility to interact with a MicroPython board over a serial connection.

    • Libraries

    Distance Laser

  • tf-luna-micropythonstars6 - A simple MicroPython i2c library for TF-Luna LiDAR Module.
  • vl53l1x_picostars5 - MicroPython driver for the vl53l1x ToF sensor.
  • VL53L0Xstars18 - MicroPython Library for Lidar Sensor VL53L0X.

    • Libraries

    Accelerometer Digital

  • ADXL345_spi_micropythonstars9 - Library for interacting through the SPI protocol with an 'Analog Devices ADXL345' accelerometer from an MCU flashed with MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Rotary Encoder

  • micropython-encoder-knobstars0 - A very simple lightweight encoder knob library with button support.
  • rotary-encoderstars15 - MicroPython code to drive a KY-040 rotary encoder.
  • encoderLibstars6 - MicroPython library to handle a rotary encoder.

    • Libraries

    Power Management

  • micropython_hourly_sleeper_librarystars13 - A MicroPython library that enables an esp8266 to sleep for hourly increments for a setup amount of hours.
  • AXP202_PythonLibrarystars9 - MicroPython AXP202 Library.

    • Libraries

    E-Paper

  • micropython_DEPG0213BNstars10 - Pure MicroPython driver for the DEPG0213BN E-Ink display found on the TTGO T5 V2.3 ESP32 boards.
  • einkstars9 - E-Ink, E-Paper display driver for MicroPython and ESP32.
  • micropython-inkplate6stars15 - MicroPython driver for the Inkplate 6.
  • Inkplate-micropythonstars49 - MicroPython driver for Inkplate boards.

    • Libraries

    Modbus

  • mp_modbusstars5 - Modbus Lib for MicroPython.
  • micropython-modbus - MicroPython port of modbus-tk.
  • micropython-modbusstars50 - Modbus Master library for MicroPython ESP32 devices. Based on pycom-modbus from pycom.

    • Libraries

    IoT

  • sensor-mqtt-homeassistantstars4 - An esp8266/32 MicroPython based sensor platform for gpio, dht, analog, led and more. Includes remote updates for .py code from web server and MQTT/Homeassistant integration.
  • aws-iot-GET-POST-loopstars14 - MicroPython code which uses the AWS-IOT REST API to GET/POST device state info.
  • SmartUPystars9 - Controlling "Tuya-type" smart power outlets using MicroPython.
  • iot-core-micropythonstars49 - Use MicroPython to connect to Google Cloud IoT Core.

    • Libraries

    DNS

  • Micropython-DNSServer-Captive-Portalstars10 - MicroPython WiFi AP Captive Portal with DNS and Web Server.
  • micropython-captiveportalstars7 - Minimal async captive portal for MicroPython (compatible with uasyncio v3/MicroPython 1.13+ as well as earlier versions).
  • tinydnsstars21 - Very simple DNS async server for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    CAN

  • micropython-mcp2515stars11 - MicroPython MCP2515 driver, porting from Arduino MCP2515 CAN interface library.
  • Robomaster-Micropythonstars12 - Robomaster S1 - MicroPython CAN BUS controller.

    • Libraries

    IR

  • micropython_espX_IR_Transceiverstars4 - MicroPython esp32 IR Transceiver.

    • Libraries

    OneWire

  • Onewire_DS18X20stars3 - Classes for driving the DS18x20 sensor with the onewire protocol for Pycom MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    REPL

  • FBConsolestars37 - Frame buffer console class for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    RFID

  • urdm6300stars0 - A MicroPython driver for the popular RDM6300 RFID card reader.

    • Libraries

    RTC

  • DS3231microstars10 - MicroPython library for DS3231.
  • micropython-ds1302-rtcstars19 - DS1302 RTC Clock driver for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    VoIP

  • uPyVoipstars9 - Voip for MicroPython ESP32 with Interactive Voice Response.

    • Libraries

    TCP

  • us2nstars16 - MicroPython bridge between UART and TCP for the ESP32.

    • Libraries

    LCD Graphic

  • micropython-SHARP_Memory_Displaystars7 - MicroPython driver for SHARP memory display.

    • Libraries

    Printer

  • micropython-thermal-printerstars19 - The MicroPython port of Python Thermal Printer by Adafruit.

    • Libraries

    OLED

  • micropython-ssd1309stars12 - MicroPython SSD1309 Monochrome OLED Display Driver.

    • Libraries

    Waveform Generator

  • ad9850_signalgenstars0 - MicroPython library for AD9850 synthesizer.
  • Signal_Generatorsstars10 - Signal generators (AD9833, AD9834, AD9850, ADF4351) tools box.
  • Clock_Generatorsstars3 - Clock generators (Si5351 for now) toolbox.

    • Libraries

    Stepper

  • microPython_AMIS-30543stars0 - MicroPython library for Stepper Driver control using AMIS-30543 driver.
  • uPySteppersstars6 - DIY rotating platform using an ESP32 connected to Wi-Fi.
  • pystepperstars3 - MicroPython Stepper Motor Sequence Control.
  • AccelStepper-MicroPythonstars23 - AccelStepper Library for MicroPython - ESP32.
  • micropython-multiaxis - Multiaxis with MicroPython ESP32 and DRV8825.

    • Libraries

    Camera

  • MQTT-Camstars5 - ESP-32 Cam MicroPython MQTT AWS S3 Uploader.
  • OV2640_uPystars7 - OV2640 Camera Library for MicroPython.
  • uPyCamstars99 - Take a photo with an ESP32-CAM running MicroPython.
  • esp32-cam-micropythonstars69 - MicroPython esp32-cam.

    • Libraries

    User Interface

  • upymenustars10 - MicroPython Menu for LCD Displays.

    • Libraries

    Threading

  • MicroWorkersstars24 - A micro workers class that easily manages a pool of threads to optimise simultaneous jobs and jobs endings, for MicroPython (used on Pycom modules & ESP32).

    • Libraries

    Scheduling

  • micropython-scronstars7 - SimpleCRON is a time-based task scheduling program inspired by the well-known CRON program for Unix systems.

    • Libraries

    Distance Ultrasonic

  • micropython-us100stars2 - MicroPython driver for the US-100 sonar distance sensor.

    • Libraries

    Dust

  • pyGP2Ystars1 - MicroPython library for the Sharp GP2Y1014AU0F Dust Sensor.

    • Libraries

    Energy

  • esp32-solar2stars0 - Simple solar regulator - MicroPython project.
  • micropython-p1meterstars8 - A ESP32 sensor to read an p1 electricity meter and publish this to MQTT and HomeAssistant, written in MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Light

  • MicroPython_MAX44009_driverstars2 - MicroPython driver for MAX44009 light sensor.
  • veml7700stars5 - Library for MicroPython for VEML7700 light sensor.
  • micropython-max44009stars1 - MicroPython driver for the MAX44009 ambient light sensor.

    • Libraries

    Radiation

  • ESPGeigerstars18 - MicroPython library for the ESP8266 Geiger counter.
  • micropython-geigerstars4 - Geiger counter with MicroPython card.

    • Libraries

    Spectral

  • AS726X_LoPystars8 - MicroPython driver for the AS726X spectral sensor.

    • Libraries

    Database

  • micropython-firebase-realtime-databasestars7 - Firebase implementation for MicroPython optimized for ESP32.
  • MicroPyDatabasestars5 - A low-memory json-based database for MicroPython.

    • Resources

  • awesome-micropythonsstars35 - The many forks & ports of MicroPython.

    • Development

    Code Generation

  • micropython-extmod-generatorstars19 - Generator for MicroPython external modules written in C.

    • Development

    Logging

  • micropython-uloggerstars14 - Lightweight log module customized for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Onkyo EISCP

  • eiscp-micropythonstars2 - MicroPython port for the Onkyo-EISCP protocol used, among others, by Pioneer.

    • Libraries

    Potentiometers

  • micropython-ad840xstars1 - MicroPython SPI-based manipulation of the AD series digital potentiometers AD8400, AD8402 and AD8403.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 24th - May 30th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

E-Paper

  • micropython-ili9341stars1 - SSD1606 active matrix epaper display 128x180.

    • Libraries

    LCD TFT

  • micropython-ili9341stars1 - Collection of drivers for TFT displays, ILI9341, SH1106, SSD1606, ST7735.
  • SSD1963-TFT-Library-for-PyBoard-and-RP2040stars22 - SSD1963 TFT Library for PyBoard and Raspberry Pi PICO.

    • Libraries

    OLED

  • micropython-oledstars1 - Collection of drivers for monochrome OLED displays, PCD8544, SH1106, SSD1306, UC1701X.

    • Libraries

    ADC

  • micropython-ads1015stars0 - ADS1015 12-Bit and ADS1115 16-bit ADC, 4 channels with programmable gain, I2C interface.

    • Libraries

    Servo

  • micropython-pca9685stars1 - 16-channel 12-bit PWM/servo driver.

    • Libraries

    Distance IR

  • micropython-gp2y0e03stars0 - IR-LED distance measuring sensor using Sharp GP2Y0E03.
  • micropython-vl6180stars0 - Time-of-Flight sensor, ambient light sensor & IR emitter.

    • Libraries

    Distance Laser

  • micropython-vl53l0xstars0 - Time-of-Flight laser-ranging sensor.

    • Libraries

    Temperature Analog

  • micropython-max31855stars0 - Thermocouple amplifier, SPI interface.

    • Libraries

    Temperature Digital

  • micropython-si7021stars0 - SI7021 Temperature and humidity sensor, I2C interface.

    • Libraries

    Rotary Encoder

  • encodermenustars76 - Simple GUI menu for micropython using a rotary encoder and basic display.

    • Books

  • MicroPython for Microcontrollers - By Günter Spanner. ISBN 9783895764370.
  • Get Started with MicroPython on Raspberry Pi Pico - By Gareth Halfacree and Ben Everard. ISBN 9781912047864.

    • Libraries

    DAC

  • mcp4728stars2 - Helper library for the Microchip MCP4728 I2C 12-bit Quad DAC.

    • Libraries

    LED Segment

  • TM74HC595stars3 - Driver for shift register controlled 5 pin display modules.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 10th - May 16th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

ADC

  • MicroPython-ADC_Calstars12 - ESP32 ADC driver using reference voltage calibration value from efuse.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 3rd - May 9th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Soil Moisture

  • MicroPython-MiFlorastars2 - Xiaomi Mi Flora (aka. flower care) BLE plant sensors (soil moisture/conductivity/light intensity/temperature).

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Apr 19th - Apr 25th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

Stepper

  • ticlibstars6 - Driver for Pololu Tic stepper motor controllers.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries

MDNS

  • micropython-mdnsstars29 - A pure python implementation of MDNS with support for Service Discovery.

    • Development

    On Host

  • mpsyncstars4 - A small tool that synchronizes a folder to a MicroPython board whenever it detects a change.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
Development

IDEs

  • JetBrains IntelliJ/PyCharm MicroPython Plugin - Plugin for MicroPython devices in IntelliJ and PyCharm.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Temperature Digital

  • micropython-lm75astars1 - Driver for the NXP LM75A digital temperature sensor.
  • micropython-sht11stars2 - Driver for Sensirion SHT11 temperature and humidity sensor.
  • micropython-tmp1075stars0 - Driver for the TI TMP1075 temperature sensor.

    • Community

  • Discord - Get an invite to the MicroPython Discord server.

    • Libraries

    Camera

  • micropython-camera-driverstars235 - OV2640 camera driver for MicroPython on ESP32.

    • Development

    Code Generation

  • micropy-stubsstars19 - Automatically Generated Stub Packages for Micropy-Cli and whomever else.

    • Libraries

    GUI

  • micropython-lcd160cr-guistars25 - Simple touch driven event based GUI for the Pyboard and LCD160CR colour display.
  • micropython_ra8875stars7 - MicroPython device driver and nano-GUI for RA8875 based displays.
  • lvglstars149 - An object oriented component based high-level GUI library with MicroPython binding.

    • Frameworks

  • terkin-dataloggerstars43 - Flexible data logger application for MicroPython and CPython.
  • micrOSstars41 - MicroPython based IoT Framework.

    • Libraries

    Cryptography

  • micropython-aesstars11 - AES algorithm with pure python implementation.
  • mpyaesstars15 - MicroPython module for AES encryption.

    • Libraries

    E-Paper

  • ssd1675astars7 - Driver for SSD1675 based E-Paper displays.

    • Libraries

    RTC

  • micropython-mcp7940stars0 - Driver for the Microchip MCP7940 RTC.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jul 6th - Jul 12th, 2020
item.description:
Books

  • MicroPython Projects - By Jacob Beningo. ISBN 9781789958034.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Light

  • bh1750 - BH1750 i2c digital light sensor driver.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Distance Laser

  • Qwiic_TOF_Module_RFD77402stars1 - Qwiic TOF Module (RFD77402) time-of-flight rangefinding module.

    • Libraries

  • GitLab Explore - Explore repositories on GitLab.
  • PyPi - This filter shows just the MicroPython libraries on PyPi. Note: You cannot pip install micropython libraries. See MicroPython docs for more information on upip.
  • GitHub Search - Search GitHub for repositories containing MicroPython.
  • GitHub Topic - MicroPython - Browse GitHub Topics for projects tagged with MicroPython.
  • Libraries.io - Libraries.io query for MicroPython.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 25th - May 31st, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

GPIO

  • micropython-debounce-switchstars7 - MicroPython Class for Debouncing Switches.

    • Development

    Debugging

  • esp32-backtracestars16 - ESP32 Exception Stack Backtrace Analyzer.

    • Libraries

    MQTT

  • MQBoardstars91 - A micro-framework for using MQTT with asyncio on MicroPython boards, primarily on the ESP32.
  • sonoff-mqtt by daveastars57 - MicroPython scripts to control Sonoff/ESP8266 using MQTT.
  • micropython-thingspeak-mqtt-esp8266stars26 - Publish and Subscribe to Thingspeak using MQTT with MicroPython running on ESP8266/ESP32 platforms.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 18th - May 24th, 2020
item.description:
Development

Code Generation

  • micropython-stubberstars104 - Generate and use stubs for different MicroPython firmwares to use with vscode and/or pylint.
  • micropy-clistars199 - Micropy Cli is a project management/generation tool for writing MicroPython code in modern IDEs such as VSCode.

    • Libraries

    Web

  • microdotstars273 - The impossibly small web framework for MicroPython.
  • uwebsocketsstars127 - MicroPython websockets implementation for ESP8266.

    • Libraries

    LEDs

  • tlc5947-rgb-micropython - Driver for the TLC5947 24 channel 12-bit PWM LED driver.
  • micropython-ws2801stars2 - A MicroPython library to interface with strands of WS2801 RGB LEDs.

    • Libraries

    Database

  • nmongostars19 - MongoDB client for CPython and MicroPython, with mongo shell like APIs.

    • Libraries

    REPL

  • jupyter_micropython_remote - Jupyter kernel to directly execute code on a MicroPython board over the serial/web REPL.
  • zepl - MicroPython WebREPL Console Application using ZeroMQ.
  • webrepl - MicroPython WebREPL.

    • Libraries

    IoT

  • micropython-home-assistant - MicroPython based scripts to extend you home assistant driven home automation projects.

    • Libraries

    DNS

  • MicroDNSSrvstars48 - A micro DNS server for MicroPython to simply respond to A queries on multi-domains with or without wildcards (used on Pycom modules & ESP32).

    • Libraries

    CAN

  • micropython-spacecan - Spacecan is a MicroPython implementation of the SpaceCAN protocol for embedded systems.

    • Libraries

    Scheduling

  • micropython-mcronstars18 - MicroCRON is a time-based task scheduling program for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    LED Segment

  • micropython-tm1640 - MicroPython Library for 16 digits 7-segment displays controlled by a TM1640.

    • Libraries

    GPIO

  • ubutton - A MicroPython library for controlling reading and debouncing pushbutton inputs, including "short" and "long" press callbacks.

    • Libraries

    Rotary Encoder

  • uencoder - A MicroPython library for reading from a rotary encoder.

    • Libraries

    PWM

  • upwmcontroller - A MicroPython library for controlling PWM outputs in an asyncio loop, with features including fading and blinking.

    • Libraries

    Gaseous

  • micropython-scd30stars18 - MicroPython I2C driver for Sensirion SCD30 CO2 sensor module.

    • Development

    On Host

  • mpfshellstars372 - A simple shell based file explorer for ESP8266 and WiPy.
  • rshellstars721 - Copy or Sync files to Boards, enter REPL from your terminal.

    • Development

    On Device

  • Micropython-Editorstars166 - Small on-board editor for PyBoard, WiPy, ESP8266, ESP32, PyCom and Adafruit devices written in Python.
  • upy-shellstars32 - A simple command line based shell for MicroPython.

    • Development

    IDEs

  • Micropython IDE for VSCode - MicroPython IDE for VSCode README.
  • Micropython-REPLink for VSCode - Handy shortcuts for interacting with a MicroPython REPL terminal.

    • Libraries

    Analytics

  • micropython-ulabstars265 - A numpy-like fast vector module for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    NTP

  • micropython-ntpclientstars3 - NTP client for MicroPython using uasyncio.

    • Libraries

    Radio

  • micropython-rfsocketstars32 - MicroPython implementation of popular 433MHzn based RFSockets.

    • Libraries

    LCD TFT

  • st7789py_mpystars50 - Slow MicroPython driver for 240x240 ST7789 display without CS pin from Ali Express, written in MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    ADC

  • micropython-hx711stars55 - MicroPython driver for HX711 24-Bit Analog-to-Digital Converter.

    • Libraries

    Air Quality

  • micropython-pms7003stars23 - MicroPython driver for the PMS7003 Air Quality Sensor.

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython May 11th - May 17th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries

Database

  • micropgstars13 - PostgreSQL database driver for MicroPython.
  • picoredisstars7 - A very minimal Redis client (not only) for MicroPython.
  • micropython-redisstars19 - A redis client implementation designed for use with MicroPython.
  • uPyMySQLstars15 - Pure uPython MySQL Client.

    • Libraries

    GPS

  • mpy-agpsstars7 - MicroPython implementation of assisted location services (AGPS).

    • Community

  • Slack - Get an automated invite to the micropython.slack.com workspace.
  • Melbourne MicroPython Meetup - Regular meetup at CCHS in Melbourne, Australia.
  • MicroPython on Facebook - Like MicroPython on Facebook for competitions, news and updates.
  • MicroPython Forum - Online community of over 6400 users discussing all things related to MicroPython.

    • Books

  • Advanced Programming in MicroPython By Example - By Yury Magda. ISBN 9781090900937.
  • MicroPython Cookbook - By Marwan Alsabbagh. ISBN 9781838649951.

    • Libraries

    NTP

  • esp8266_ntp_webserverstars2 - MicroPython + esp8266 + ntp + webserver.
  • micropython_ntpserverstars1 - An NTP server written for MicroPython.
  • micropython-ntpdstars1 - An implementation of an ntpd in MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Stepper

  • uln2003stars39 - Driver for 5V 28BYJ-48 stepper motors.

    • Resources

  • MicroPython on Wikipedia - MicroPython on Wikipedia.

    • Development

    IDEs

  • Thonny IDE - Thonny: Python IDE for beginners.
  • Mu Editor - Code with Mu: a simple Python\MicroPythonb\CircuitPython editor for beginner programmers.

    • Libraries

    LCD TFT

  • micropython-ili9341stars13 - ILI9341 TFT driver for MicroPython on ESP32.
  • micropython-ili9341stars85 - MicroPython Driver for ILI9341 display.
  • st7789_mpystars130 - Fast pure-C driver for MicroPython that can handle display modules on ST7789 chip.
  • micropython-ili9341stars53 - MicroPython ILI9341 display & XPT2046 touch screen driver.

    • Libraries

    Web

  • micropython-nogginstars16 - A very simple web server for MicroPython.
  • MicroRESTClistars26 - A micro JSON REST Web client based on MicroWebCli for MicroPython (used on Pycom modules & ESP32).
  • micropyserverstars42 - MicroPyServer is a simple HTTP server for MicroPython projects.
  • microCoAPystars41 - A mini client/server implementation of CoAP (Constrained Application Protocol) into MicroPython.
  • ESP8266WebServerstars46 - ESP8266 web server for MicroPython.
  • uPyPortalstars37 - A captive portal for MicroPython using ESP32 (WeMos).
  • micropython-captive-portalstars45 - A captive portal demo for MicroPython.
  • upy-websocket-serverstars60 - MicroPython (ESP8266) websocket server implementation.
  • tinywebstars166 - Simple and lightweight HTTP async server for MicroPython.
  • MicroWebSrv2stars479 - The last Micro Web Server for IoTs (MicroPython) or large servers (CPython), that supports WebSockets, routes, template engine and with really optimized architecture (mem allocations, async I/Os).
  • MicroWebSrvstars505 - A micro HTTP Web server that supports WebSockets, html/python language templating and routing handlers, for MicroPython (used on Pycom modules & ESP32).

    • Libraries

    MQTT

  • uMQTTstars9 - MQTT publish for MicroPython on the WiPy board.
  • micropython-sonoff-switchstars8 - Implements a MQTT controllable switch for the iTead Sonoff Switch using MicroPython.
  • umqtt_aws_iotstars17 - Publish UMQTT messages with MicroPython to AWS IoT.
  • pysmartnodestars95 - MicroPython Smarthome framework.
  • micropython-mqttstars361 - A 'resilient' asynchronous MQTT driver. Plus a means of using an ESP8266 to bring MQTT to non-networked targets.

    • Libraries

    Analytics

  • micropython-fourierstars62 - Fast Fourier transform in MicroPython's inline ARM assembler.
  • uMathstars13 - Computer Algebra for microcontrollers.

    • Libraries

    Radio

  • micropython-ys-rf34tstars6 - MicroPython examples using YS-RF34T 433MHz ASK/OOK UART transceivers.
  • micropython_remotestars30 - Capture and replay 433MHz remote control codes. Control remote switched power adaptors.

    • Libraries

    Zigbee

  • ZbPystars35 - MicroPython IEEE802.15.4 / Zigbee parser.

    • Libraries

    IoT

  • SonosRemotestars43 - A remote for Sonos installations running on an ESP8266 and using Sonos HTTP API.
  • uPyEchostars47 - Emulated Belkin WeMo device that works with Amazon Echo (Alexa) using MicroPython on an ESP32.
  • microhomiestars72 - MicroPython implementation of the Homie MQTT convention for IoT.

    • Libraries

    FTP

  • MicroFTPServerstars32 - Minimal FTP Server that can run on an ESP8266 with MicroPython.
  • FTP-Server-for-ESP8266-ESP32-and-PYBDstars122 - Small FTP server for ESP8266/ESP32/PYBD on the MicroPython platform.
  • micropython-ftplibstars18 - An FTP client library for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    LCD Character

  • micropython-lcdstars17 - Class for controlling the HD44780 from a MicroPython pyboard.

    • Libraries

    LCD Graphic

  • micropython-hx1230stars5 - MicroPython library for HX1230 96x68 LCD modules.

    • Libraries

    Motion Inertial

  • micropython-mpu6886stars15 - MicroPython I2C driver for MPU6886 6-axis motion tracking device.

    • Libraries

    Camera

  • Nikon-Trigger-for-MicroPythonstars2 - Remote trigger for a Nikon camera using an IR LED. For PyBoard v1.1.

    • Libraries

    Barometer

  • micropython-bmp280stars45 - Module for the BMP280 sensor.
  • BME280stars71 - MicroPython driver for the BME280 sensor, target platform Pycom devices.

    • Libraries

    LED Matrix

  • micropython-max7219stars32 - MicroPython driver for MAX7219 8x8 LED matrix.

    • Libraries

    ADC

  • micropython-ads1219stars3 - MicroPython module for the Texas Instruments ADS1219 ADC.
  • ADS7818 - Python class interfacing the ADS7818 AD-converter.

    • Libraries

    IO-Expander

  • micropython-pcf8575stars4 - MicroPython driver for PCF8575 16-Bit I2C I/O Expander with Interrupt.
  • micropython-pcf8574stars17 - MicroPython driver for PCF8574 8-Bit I2C I/O Expander with Interrupt.
  • micropython-mcp23017stars32 - MicroPython driver for MCP23017 16-bit I/O Expander.

    • Libraries

    GPIO

  • micropython-inputsstars23 - Classes to count pulses, debounce digital inputs, and calculate moving averages of analog inputs for a MicroPython board.

    • Libraries

    Rotary Encoder

  • micropython-rotarystars170 - MicroPython module to read a rotary encoder.

    • Libraries

    Air Quality

  • pollystars12 - SDS011 pollution sensor + Wemos D1 mini pro + MicroPython.
  • micropython-pms5003-minimalstars1 - Driver for pms5003 air quality sensor for MicroPython.
  • pms5003_micropythonstars19 - Driver for pms5003 air quality sensor for MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Compass

  • QMC5883stars7 - Python class for the QMC5883 Three-Axis Digital Compass IC.

    • Libraries

    Energy

  • MCP39F521stars5 - ESP8266 scripts for reading MCP39F521 power monitors.

    • Libraries

    Gaseous

  • CCS811stars27 - Basic MicroPython driver for CCS811 on ESP8266 boards.

    • Libraries

    Touch Resistive

  • XPT2046-touch-pad-driverstars12 - Driver for XPT2046 touch pad controller used in many TFT modules.

    • Libraries

    FRAM

  • micropython-framstars0 - Pyboard driver for Ferroelectric RAM module.

    • Libraries

    E-Paper

  • micropython-waveshare-epdstars44 - Waveshare E-Paper Display driver for devices running Pycom-flavored MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    WiFi

  • micropython-wifimanagerstars46 - A simple network configuration utility for MicroPython on the ESP8266 board.

    • Libraries

    Telnet

  • MicroTelnetServerstars63 - Simple telnet server for MicroPython and the ESP8266 allowing telnet clients access to the REPL.

    • Libraries

    Serial

  • mpy-minitermstars17 - Tool for seamless serial debug and file synchronisation with MicroPython devices via the serial REPL.

    • Libraries

    SMTP

  • uMailstars44 - A lightweight, scalable SMTP client for sending email in MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    IR

  • esp8266_irstars47 - Control IR signal by websocket.
  • micropython-ys-irtmstars17 - MicroPython examples for YS-IRTM 5V NEC Infrared UART transceivers.
  • micropython-amg88xxstars13 - Driver for Grid-EYE thermal infra red array sensor (Adafruit 3538).
  • micropython_irstars113 - Nonblocking device drivers to receive from IR remotes and for IR "blaster" apps.

    • Libraries

    LoRaWAN

  • uPyLoRaWANstars163 - ESP32 using MicroPython meets LoRa and LoRaWAN.

    • Libraries

    GSM

  • micropython-upyphonestars411 - A gsm phone using pyboard and sim800l.

    • Libraries

    DNS

  • ICantBelieveItsNotDNSstars19 - "I Can't Believe It's Not DNS!" (ICBIND) is an authoritative DNS server for the ESP8266 written in MicroPython.

    • Libraries

    Audio

  • micropython-midistars34 - A midi implementation example for MicroPython.
  • upy-rtttlstars21 - Python Parser for Ring Tone Text Transfer Language (RTTTL).
  • micropython-vs1053stars16 - Asynchronous driver for VS1053b MP3 player.

    • Libraries

    AI

  • MicroMLPstars133 - A micro neural network multilayer perceptron for MicroPython (used on ESP32 and Pycom modules).

item.title: mcauser/awesome-micropython Dec 17th - Dec 23rd, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Motion Inertial

  • micropython-mpu9250stars95 - I2C driver for MPU9250 9-axis motion tracking device.
  • micropython-mpu9x50stars207 - Driver for the InvenSense MPU9250 inertial measurement unit.
  • micropython-lsm9ds0stars4 - LSM9DS0 g-force linear acceleration, gauss magnetic and dps angular rate sensors.
  • MPU6050-ESP8266-MicroPythonstars71 - ESP8266 driver for MPU6050 accelerometer/gyroscope.
  • py-mpu6050stars80 - ESP8266 driver for MPU6050 accelerometer/gyroscope.
  • micropython-bmx055stars4 - Driver for Bosch BMX055 IMU sensor.
  • micropython-bno055stars3 - Bosch Sensortec BNO055 9DOF IMU sensor, I2C interface.

    • Libraries

    LED Matrix

  • micropython-ht1632cstars5 - Driver for HT1632C 32x16 bicolor led matrix.
  • micropython-wemos-led-matrixstars1 - Driver for Wemos D1 Mini Matrix LED shield, using TM1640 chip.
  • micropython-wemos-led-matrix-shieldstars6 - Driver for Wemos D1 Mini Matrix LED shield, using TM1640 chip.
  • micropython-matrix8x8stars13 - Driver for AdaFruit 8x8 LED Matrix display with HT16K33 backpack.
  • micropython-max7219stars128 - Driver for MAX7219 8x8 LED matrix modules.

    • Libraries

    Energy

  • ATM90E26_Micropythonstars2 - Driver for ATM90E26 energy metering device.

    • Libraries

    Accelerometer Digital

  • micropython-lis2hh12stars9 - I2C driver for LIS2HH12 3-axis accelerometer.
  • adxl345_micropythonstars4 - Driver for ADXL345 16g 3-axis accelerometer.
  • MMA7660 - Driver for MMA7660 1.5g 3-axis accelerometer.
  • ADXL345-with-Pyboardstars0 - Driver for ADXL345 16g 3-axis accelerometer.

    • Libraries

    LCD TFT

  • micropython-ili934xstars12 - SPI driver for ILI934X series based TFT / LCD displays.
  • MicroPython-ST7735stars103 - ESP32 version of GuyCarvers's ST7735 TFT LCD driver.
  • micropython-st7735stars25 - Driver for ST7735 TFT LCDs.
  • MicroPython_ST7735stars20 - Driver for ST7735 128x128 TFT.
  • ST7735 - Driver for ST7735 TFT LCDs.

    • Libraries

    GPS

  • micropython-gnssl76lstars2 - MicroPython I2C driver for Quectel GNSS L76-L (GPS).
  • micropyGPSstars271 - Full featured GPS NMEA sentence parser.

    • Libraries

    Temperature Digital

  • sht25-micropythonstars2 - Driver for SHT25 temperature and humidity sensor.
  • micropython-Si7005stars1 - Driver for Si7005 relative humidity and temperature sensor.
  • micropython-sht30stars34 - Driver for SHT30 temperature and humidity sensor.
  • LM75-MicroPythonstars2 - Driver for LM75 digital temperature sensor, I2C interface.
  • micropython-si7021stars11 - SI7021 Temperature and humidity sensor, I2C interface.
  • bme680-mqtt-micropythonstars13 - Driver for BME680 gas, pressure, temperature and humidity sensor.
  • micropython-am2320stars22 - Aosong AM2320 temperature and humidity sensor, I2C interface.
  • micropython-dht12stars16 - Aosong DHT12 temperature and humidity sensor, I2C interface.
  • micropython-hdc1008stars4 - Driver for the Texas Instruments HDC1008 humidity and temperature sensor.
  • micropython-mcp9808stars4 - Driver for the Microchip MCP9808 temperature sensor.
  • micropython-mpl115a2stars2 - Pyboard driver for the MPL115A2 barometric pressure sensor.
  • micropython-sht31stars18 - Driver for the SHT31 temperature and humidity sensor.
  • micropython-Si705xstars1 - Silicon Labs Si705x series of temperature sensors, I2C interface.
  • micropython-Si70xxstars2 - Silicon Labs Si70xx series of relative humidity and temperature sensors, I2C interface.
  • micropython-tmp102stars7 - Driver for TMP102 digital temperature sensor.
  • Official DHT11+DHT12 - ESP8266 driver for DHT11 and DHT12 temperature and humidity sensor.

    • Libraries

    Barometer

  • micropython-bmp180stars72 - Driver for Bosch BMP180 temperature, pressure and altitude sensor.
  • micropython-bme280stars1 - Driver for the Bosch BME280 temperature/pressure/humidity sensor.
  • mpy_bme280_esp8266stars69 - Bosch BME280 temperature/pressure/humidity sensor.

    • Libraries

    Audio

  • micropython-longwavestars5 - WAV player for MicroPython board.
  • micropython-dfplayerstars30 - Driver for DFPlayer Mini using UART.
  • KT403A-MP3stars8 - Driver for KT403A, used by DFPlayer Mini and Grove MP3 v2.0.

    • Libraries

    Soil Moisture

  • micropython-chirpstars2 - Driver for the Chirp Soil Moisture Sensor.

    Light

  • MicroPython-SI1145stars5 - SI1145 UV index, IR, visible light and proximity sensor.
  • mpy_bh1750fvi_esp8266stars15 - ESP8266 driver for BH1750FVI sensor.
  • micropython-tsl2561stars3 - Driver for the TSL2561 illumination sensor from TAOS / ams.

    Gaseous

  • MQ135stars30 - Driver for MQ135 gas sensor.
  • micropython-MQstars16 - Drivers for MQ series gas sensors.

    ADC

  • ads1x15stars62 - Driver for the ADS1015/ADS1115 ADC, I2C interface.
  • Micropython_ADS1115stars4 - ADS1115 16-bit ADC, 4 channels with programmable gain, I2C interface.

    Air Quality

  • CCS811stars0 - CCS811 Air Quality Sensor.
  • upython-aq-monitorstars27 - Air Quality monitor using PMS5003 sensor and WiPy.

    LEDs

  • micropython-morsecodestars3 - Blink an LED with morse coded message.
  • micropython-ws2812stars167 - Driver for WS2812 RGB LEDs.
  • micropython-ws2812-7segstars1 - 7-segment display using WS2812 RGB LEDs.
  • micropython-p9813stars3 - Driver for P9813 RGB LED used in SeeedStudio's Grove Chainable RGB LED.
  • tlc5940-micropythonstars4 - Driver for TLC5940 16 channel LED driver.

    Camera

  • micropython-ov2640stars80 - MicroPython class for OV2640 camera.

    IO-Expander

  • micropython-mcp230xxstars30 - Driver for MCP23017 and MCP23008 GPIO expanders.

    LCD Character

  • pyboard-LCD-character-displaystars1 - PyBoard driver for HDD44780 compatible 1602 LCDs.
  • lcdi2cstars2 - Driver for HD44780 compatible dot matrix LCDs.
  • micropython-charlcdstars12 - Driver for HD44780 compatible LCDs.
  • Grove_RGB_LCD - Driver for SeeedStudio's Grove RGB LCD.
  • micropython-i2c-lcdstars17 - Driver for I2C 2x16 LCD Screens.
  • python_lcdstars245 - Driver for HD44780 compatible dot matrix LCDs.

    • Libraries

    OLED

  • SH1106stars96 - Driver for the SH1106 OLED display.
  • Grove_OLED - Driver for SSD1327 used by SeeedStudio's Grove OLED Display 1.12" v1.0.
  • micropython-ssd1327stars19 - Driver for SSD1327 128x128 4-bit greyscale OLED displays.
  • micropython-ssd1351stars41 - Driver for SSD1351 OLED displays.
  • MicroPython_SSD1306stars7 - ESP8266 driver for SSD1306 OLED 128x64 displays.
  • Official SSD1306 - Driver for SSD1306 128x64 OLED displays.

    • Libraries

    LED Segment

  • max7219_8digitstars12 - Driver for MAX7219 8-digit 7-segment LED modules.
  • micropython-max7219stars5 - Driver for MAX7219 8-digit 7-segment LED modules.
  • LKM1638stars1 - Driver for JY-LKM1638 displays based on TM1638 controller.
  • micropython-tm1640stars12 - Driver for TM1740 8x8 LED matrix modules.
  • micropython-tm1638stars17 - Driver for TM1638 dual quad 7-segment LED modules with switches.
  • micropython-my9221stars5 - Driver for MY9221 10-segment LED bar graph modules.
  • micropython-tm1637stars107 - Driver for TM1637 quad 7-segment LED modules.

    LCD Graphic

  • micropython-st7565stars7 - Driver for ST7565 128x64 LCDs.

  • micropython-pcd8544stars50 - Driver for Nokia 5110 PCD8544 84x48 LCD modules.
  • micropython-st7920stars7 - Library for simple graphic primitives on ST7920 128x64 monochrome LCD panel using ESP8266 and SPI.
  • MicroPython_PCD8544stars3 - ESP8266 driver for Nokia 5110 PCD8544.
  • Official LCD160CR - Driver for official MicroPython LCD160CR display with resistive touch sensor.

    • Community

  • MicroPython on Twitter - Follow MicroPython on Twitter for latest news and updates.

    • Resources

  • MicroPython on GitHubstars15.2k - Submit bug reports, follow and join in development on GitHub.
  • MicroPython Store - Where you can buy the pyboard, housings, skins, books, connectors and peripherals.

    • Miscellaneous

  • MicroPython Kickstarter - 1,931 backers pledged £97,803 to help bring this project to life.
  • MicroPython on the ESP8266 Kickstarter - 1,399 backers pledged £28,534 to help bring this project to life.
